name: Apple Hospitality REIT, Inc.
description: Apple Hospitality REIT, Inc. (NYSE: APLE) is a publicly traded real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns one of the largest and most diverse portfolios of upscale, rooms-focused hotels in the United States. The Company's portfolio consists of high-quality hotels, primarily franchised with industry-leading brands Marriott and Hilton, located in prominent markets across numerous states. Apple Hospitality is focused on maximizing shareholder value through disciplined capital allocation, active asset management, and the maintenance of a strong, flexible balance sheet.
